add_spacer|small|
add_label|small|`$/longpunch`` - `oEnabled `$Long Punch`` it allows you to break and build further away!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/skiptime`` - `oActivate the `$Skip Time`` ability! It makes your trees and providers grow 12 hours instantly!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/mod`` - `oModerate a player, apply punishments & more!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/banworld`` - `oNuke a world, ban players, or even ban players from game!``|left|

add_label|small|`$/invis`` - `oBecome invisible to everyone! No one will ever know you exist!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/nick`` - `oTemporarily change your nickname!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/hide`` - `oHide your Moderator's status, you'll look like a normal player!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/hideflag`` - `oHide your Country flag!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/warpto`` - `oMagically teleport to your desired player!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/silence`` - `oMute a player for specific time!``|left|
add_label|small|`$/unsilence`` - `oRemove a mute from a player!``|left|
